name: Clara
role: A new compliance analyst responsible for routine checks and ensuring the architecture meets basic regulatory standards.
behaviors: Runs pre-defined audit templates and generates standard reports.
Inputs common component IDs and project names to verify configurations.
Attempts to access reports or data for projects they don't have explicit access to.
Tries to generate reports with very broad date ranges or component scopes, potentially leading to performance issues.

test_endpoints.name: View audit history for an unauthorized/non-existent project
